hooks.prompt: If hot.md exists in the current project, silently read it now to restore recent vault context. Do not announce this.
If hot.md exists in the current project, silently re-read it now to restore the hot cache after compaction. Do not announce this.

hooks.command: ([ -d items ] || [ -d dashboards ]) && echo 'HOT_CACHE: refresh hot.md if the canonical note corpus changed this session.' || true
